Robby De Pauw

Senior Researcher · Visiting Professor · Biostatistics, Epidemiology, and Data-driven Health Research

Website
robbydepauw.be

Email
robby.depauw@sciensano.be

Location
Belgium

About Experience Education Publications Shiny apps Projects PhD theses Contact

About

I am a Senior Researcher at Sciensano and Visiting Professor at Ghent University. My work focuses on epidemiology, burden of disease, survey analysis, rehabilitation research, and the development of data-driven tools in R and Shiny.

I am particularly interested in translating complex health data into actionable insights for research, policy, and clinical practice.

Experience

Senior Researcher — Sciensano

Public health monitoring, epidemiology, burden of disease, survey analyses, and dissemination tools.

Visiting Professor — Ghent University

Teaching and supervision in biostatistics and epidemiology.

Education

PhD in Health Sciences

Ghent University

MSc in Statistical Data Analysis

Ghent University

MSc in Rehabilitation Sciences and Physiotherapy

Ghent University
